policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). DISPUTE POLICY: disputes accepted within 60 days of statement date. Temporary credit within 10 business days. Investigation: up to 90 days; merchant contacted for evidence. MAX COMPENSATION: reversal of disputed charge + related fees/interest. PROHIBITED: additional monetary compensation; guaranteeing favorable outcome before investigation; permanent credit before investigation concludes. REQUIRED: transaction date, amount, merchant name, supporting documentation (receipts, tracking, correspondence). TONE: professional, procedural.
max_compensation_text: reversal of disputed charge + related fees/interest.

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). LATE FEE: $29 (first) or $40 (subsequent) when minimum not received by due date. HARDSHIP: eligible customers may apply for temporary reduced APR (9.9%, up to 12 months) or modified payment plan. MAX COMPENSATION: waiver of up to 2 late fees per 12-month period; temporary APR reduction if qualified. PROHIBITED: permanent rate changes; principal balance forgiveness; approving hardship before review. REQUIRED: account verification, payment history review. TONE: empathetic, acknowledge financial difficulty.
max_compensation_text: waiver of up to 2 late fees per 12-month period; temporary APR reduction if qualified.

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). LATE FEE: $29 (first) or $40 (subsequent) when minimum not received by due date. HARDSHIP: eligible customers may apply for temporary reduced APR (9.9%, up to 12 months) or modified payment plan. MAX COMPENSATION: waiver of up to 2 late fees per 12-month period; temporary APR reduction if qualified. PROHIBITED: permanent rate changes; principal balance forgiveness; approving hardship before review. REQUIRED: account verification, payment history review. TONE: empathetic, acknowledge financial difficulty.
max_compensation_text: waiver of up to 2 late fees per 12-month period; temporary APR reduction if qualified.

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). FRAUD POLICY: temporary credit within 10 business days of report. Investigation: up to 90 days. If confirmed fraud: permanent credit + new card number + waiver of related fees/interest. MAX COMPENSATION: full reversal of fraudulent charges + related fee/interest waiver. PROHIBITED: additional monetary compensation beyond reversal; credit limit increases as compensation; guaranteeing investigation timeline < 90 days. REQUIRED: cardholder identity verification, last 4 digits, disputed transaction date(s) and amount(s). TONE: reassuring, take security seriously.
max_compensation_text: full reversal of fraudulent charges + related fee/interest waiver.

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). REPORTING POLICY: account info reported monthly to Equifax, Experian, TransUnion per FCRA. Dispute: internal review within 30 days; correction submitted if error confirmed. MAX COMPENSATION: correction of verified errors. Discretionary goodwill letter to bureaus (not guaranteed). PROHIBITED: removal of accurate negative information; direct credit score modification; promising goodwill adjustment. REQUIRED: specific dates, account details, nature of alleged error. TONE: empathetic but factual.
max_compensation_text: correction of verified errors. Discretionary goodwill letter to bureaus (not guaranteed).

policy_text: COMPANY: Horizon Hotels Group. SERVICE STANDARD: front desk ≤10 min wait; maintenance resolved within 2 hrs; WiFi/phone/AC must be functional. MAX COMPENSATION: 15% discount on current stay OR loyalty points (3,000 max). PROHIBITED: cash refunds for completed stays; free future nights without manager approval. REQUIRED: reservation number. TONE: professional, solution-oriented.
forbidden_terms: free future nights without manager approval
max_compensation_text: 15% discount on current stay OR loyalty points (3,000 max).

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). CREDIT LIMIT: periodically reviewed based on creditworthiness, usage, account history. Decreases may occur due to reduced usage, score changes, or risk updates. CUSTOMER OPTIONS: request formal review (7-10 business days); provide updated income documentation. MAX COMPENSATION: no monetary compensation for limit changes; may expedite review process. PROHIBITED: guaranteed limit restoration; overriding automated risk decisions without underwriting. REQUIRED: account verification. TONE: professional, transparent.
forbidden_terms: overriding automated risk decisions without underwriting
max_compensation_text: no monetary compensation for limit changes; may expedite review process.

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). LATE FEE: $29 (first) or $40 (subsequent) when minimum not received by due date. max_compensation_text: waiver of up to 2 late fees per 12-month period; temporary APR reduction if qualified.

policy_text: COMPANY: Horizon Hotels Group. CLEANLINESS: rooms must pass hygiene checklist before check-in. Failure: immediate room change OR early checkout with prorated refund. MAX COMPENSATION: complimentary night (≤$200) OR 25% discount on current stay. PROHIBITED: cash compensation beyond prorated unused nights; blaming staff by name. REQUIRED: reservation number. TONE: sincerely apologetic, acknowledge health/safety concern.
forbidden_terms: cash compensation beyond prorated unused nights
max_compensation_text: complimentary night (≤$200) OR 25% discount on current stay.

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). PAYMENTS: received before 5 PM ET posted same business day; after 5 PM next business day. Holds: up to 7 business days for new sources or payments >2x minimum. Overpayments: refund via check within 5-7 business days upon request. MAX COMPENSATION: expedited release (2 business days) + fee waiver for processing delays. PROHIBITED: interest compensation for hold periods; same-day resolution guarantees. REQUIRED: payment method, date, amount. TONE: solution-oriented.
max_compensation_text: expedited release (2 business days) + fee waiver for processing delays.

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). DISPUTE POLICY: disputes accepted within 60 days of statement date. Temporary credit within 10 business days. policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). ACCOUNTS: opened/closed/restricted based on identity verification and creditworthiness. Verification: government-issued photo ID + SSN; 7-10 business days for manual review. Closure: customer may request at any time; balance remains due. Secured deposit: refunded within 8 weeks if $0 balance. MAX COMPENSATION: annual fee waiver for documented service failure. PROHIBITED: monetary compensation for application decisions; account changes without identity verification. TONE: professional, procedural.
max_compensation_text: annual fee waiver for documented service failure.

policy_text: COMPANY: Horizon Hotels Group. RENOVATION DISCLOSURE: must be disclosed at booking. If not disclosed: guest eligible for room upgrade OR 15% discount. MAX COMPENSATION: 20% discount on current stay OR complimentary room upgrade (subject to availability). PROHIBITED: full refund for completed stays; compensation for future stays without manager approval. REQUIRED: reservation number. TONE: apologetic, acknowledge inconvenience.
forbidden_terms: compensation for future stays without manager approval
max_compensation_text: 20% discount on current stay OR complimentary room upgrade (subject to availability).

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). PAYMENTS: received before 5 PM ET posted same business day; after 5 PM next business day. MAX COMPENSATION: expedited release (2 business days) + fee waiver for processing delays. PROHIBITED: interest compensation for hold periods; same-day resolution guarantees. REQUIRED: payment method, date, amount. TONE: solution-oriented.

policy_text: COMPANY: Horizon Hotels Group. RENOVATION DISCLOSURE: must be disclosed at booking. If not disclosed: guest eligible for room upgrade OR 15% discount. MAX COMPENSATION: 20% discount on current stay OR complimentary room upgrade (subject to availability). PROHIBITED: full refund for completed stays; compensation for future stays without manager approval. REQUIRED: reservation number. TONE: apologetic, acknowledge inconvenience.
forbidden_terms: compensation for future stays without manager approval
max_compensation_text: 20% discount on current stay OR complimentary room upgrade (subject to availability).

policy_text: COMPANY: Horizon Hotels Group. CLEANLINESS: rooms must pass hygiene checklist before check-in. Failure: immediate room change OR early checkout with prorated refund. MAX COMPENSATION: complimentary night (≤$200) OR 25% discount on current stay. PROHIBITED: cash compensation beyond prorated unused nights; blaming staff by name. REQUIRED: reservation number. TONE: sincerely apologetic, acknowledge health/safety concern.
forbidden_terms: cash compensation beyond prorated unused nights
max_compensation_text: complimentary night (≤$200) OR 25% discount on current stay.

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). LATE FEE: $29 (first) or $40 (subsequent) when minimum not received by due date. PROHIBITED: permanent rate changes; principal balance forgiveness; approving hardship before review. REQUIRED: account verification, payment history review. TONE: empathetic, acknowledge financial difficulty.

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). CREDIT LIMIT: periodically reviewed based on creditworthiness, usage, account history. max_compensation_text: waiver of up to 2 late fees per 12-month period; temporary APR reduction if qualified.

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). DISPUTE POLICY: disputes accepted within 60 days of statement date. Temporary credit within 10 business days. Investigation: up to 90 days; merchant contacted for evidence. MAX COMPENSATION: reversal of disputed charge + related fees/interest. PROHIBITED: additional monetary compensation; guaranteeing favorable outcome before investigation; permanent credit before investigation concludes. REQUIRED: transaction date, amount, merchant name, supporting documentation (receipts, tracking, correspondence). TONE: professional, procedural.
max_compensation_text: reversal of disputed charge + related fees/interest.

policy_text: COMPANY: Horizon Hotels Group. CLEANLINESS: rooms must pass hygiene checklist before check-in. Failure: immediate room change OR early checkout with prorated refund. MAX COMPENSATION: complimentary night (≤$200) OR 25% discount on current stay. PROHIBITED: cash compensation beyond prorated unused nights; blaming staff by name. REQUIRED: reservation number. TONE: sincerely apologetic, acknowledge health/safety concern.
forbidden_terms: cash compensation beyond prorated unused nights
max_compensation_text: complimentary night (≤$200) OR 25% discount on current stay.

policy_text: COMPANY: Apex Financial Corp (Credit Card Division). FRAUD POLICY: temporary credit within 10 business days of report. Investigation: up to 90 days. If confirmed fraud: permanent credit + new card number + waiver of related fees/interest. MAX COMPENSATION: full reversal of fraudulent charges + related fee/interest waiver. PROHIBITED: additional monetary compensation beyond reversal; credit limit increases as compensation; guaranteeing investigation timeline < 90 days. REQUIRED: cardholder identity verification, last 4 digits, disputed transaction date(s) and amount(s). TONE: reassuring, take security seriously.
max_compensation_text: full reversal of fraudulent charges + related fee/interest waiver.
